description: Honest assessment of module maturity across Rosetta-Shape-Core. Every module has a level: stable (tested, depended-on), maturing (functional, growing), or early (sketch, proof-of-concept). AI agents should trust stable modules and treat early modules as exploratory.

maturity_levels.stable: Tested, depended-on by other modules, safe to build against. Changes here require full test suite pass.
maturity_levels.maturing: Functional and tested but still evolving. API may shift. Usable but not frozen.
maturity_levels.early: Proof-of-concept or sketch. Conceptually sound but thin implementation. Not yet load-bearing.

modules.role: Graph loader — loads ontology, rules, bridges, families, LID atlas
modules.notes: Core dependency for everything. Clean, minimal, well-tested.

modules.role: Bridge resolver — indexes bridge mappings for runtime lookup
modules.notes: New module. Index works but bridge data uses descriptive text, not clean IDs in most cases. Will activate more as bridges adopt standardized ID references.

modules.role: Sensor registry, PAD states, family-sensor context
modules.notes: Well-tested via explore tests. Sensor shapes limited to a few currently.

modules.role: Seed physics — compute_seed_state, branching threshold, saturation
modules.notes: Core growth mechanics. Tested via explore and sim tests.

modules.role: Shadow hunting — anomaly detection, phi patterns, boundary mapping
modules.notes: Tested. Provides economic equations, signal distortions, narrative physics.

modules.role: Discovery engine — home_base, discover (5 path types), check_merge
modules.notes: Central module. Re-exports all submodules. Handles LID rules, Rosetta rules, direct links, bridge connections, family affinities. Now includes bridge_mapping path type.
Tested. Rules are JSONL-based. Clean and minimal.
CLI entry point. Well-tested at all three depths.

modules.role: Multi-agent ecosystem simulation with energy/trust dynamics
modules.notes: Functional, 25 tests. Now includes EnergyLedger with per-tick tracking, saturation/non-negative violation detection. Energy model is open-system (not closed conservation) — documented.

modules.role: 8 structural checks + 7 immutable axioms + CORDYCEPS detection
modules.notes: Load-bearing safety module. Checks physics guards, merge gates, scope, CORDYCEPS patterns, conservation, provenance, life-bearing, use constraints.
Validates JSON Schema 2020-12, entity references, bridge refs, fieldlink topology.
Uses Fraction arithmetic (no float drift). Resource-budgeted. Well-tested.

modules.role: Manipulation vs practice detection via constraint consistency
modules.notes: Conceptually ambitious — detects manipulation signatures in narratives. Implementation is functional but thin. Tests exist but are basic. Not yet integrated into sim or explore.
Encodes knowledge provenance chains. Early-stage — works in isolation but not wired into other modules. Tests are basic.

modules.role: Deep axiom verification — DMAIC, sensitivity analysis, FMEA
modules.notes: Most ambitious module. Implements full DMAIC analysis cycle, sensitivity analysis, FMEA. Powerful for engineering verification but orthogonal to core system. Not called by any other module. Standalone tool.
Functional CLI tool. No dedicated test file.
Tested. Uses PAD states for cache key computation.

summary.recommendation: Build against stable modules. Use maturing modules with awareness they may change. Treat early modules as research — read them for ideas, don't depend on their APIs.
